text.title: GitLab Issue Boards Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (gitlab_tier, scoped_labels_available, issue_volume_per_month) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: GitLab is source-of-truth for code AND issues?

branch.question: Scoped labels available (Premium+ OR self-hosted EE)?

conclusion.verdict: apply full board config with scoped-label status states
upgrade tier OR use simple free-form board with manual hygiene
pick native tool for the actual source-of-truth (GitHub Projects v2, Jira, Linear)

text.example: gitlab_is_source_of_truth=true → scoped_labels_available=true → apply full board config (rule scoped-labels-required).
